IN.citizenship: Indian Citizen (Non-Resident Indians eligible as Overseas Electors)
IN.registration: Form 6 for New Voters; Form 8 for Corrections
IN.id_policy: Voter ID (EPIC) is standard; 12 alternatives permitted
conduct_rules: Silence period starts 48 hours before poll end
Exit polls prohibited until last phase completes
Model Code of Conduct (MCC) in effect during cycle
